ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Work class ID of the individual (foreign key) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual in the dataset */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Education ID of the individual (foreign key) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* Marital ID of the individual (foreign key) */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Occupation ID of the individual (foreign key) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain amount */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss amount */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "income_class_id" INTEGER /* Income class ID of the individual (foreign key) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of residence */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_class_id") REFERENCES income_classes ("income_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "workclass_description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "occupation_description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years associated with the education level */,
  "education_description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "marital_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_classes" (
  "income_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for income class */,
  "income_class" TEXT /* Income class description (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "income_class_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., view-only, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Work class ID of the individual (foreign key)
Final weight of the individual in the dataset
Education ID of the individual (foreign key)
Marital ID of the individual (foreign key)
Occupation ID of the individual (foreign key)
Income class ID of the individual (foreign key)
Number of years associated with the education level
Detailed description of the marital status
Detailed description of the income class
Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator)
Access level of the user (e.g., view-only, edit, admin)
